About the job
The Applications Development Senior Manager is a senior management level position responsible for accomplishing results through the management of a team or department in an effort to establish and implement new or revised application systems and programs in coordination with the Technology team.

The overall objective of this role is to drive applications systems analysis and programming activities, build ML-powered tools and data products that solve complex data quality issues and automate business processes across Citi's global operations as part of our Data & AI Engineering team. This is a hands-on engineering role — you will own solutions end-to-end, from problem definition through production deployment.

Responsibilities:

Design and build machine learning models and pipelines to detect, classify, and resolve data quality issues at scale
Handles prompt engineering. 
Sets up RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline. 
Focuses on training, fine-tuning, and optimizing AI models. 
Requires deeper knowledge of algorithms and mathematics
Develop automation tools that eliminate manual effort in data reconciliation, anomaly detection, and reporting workflows
Build and maintain internal data products and APIs that expose ML capabilities to business users and downstream systems
Collaborate with data scientists, engineers, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into production-ready solutions
Collaborate with MLOps to Implement best practices including CI/CD for ML, model versioning, experiment tracking, and performance monitoring
Identify and apply ML and automation techniques to reduce operational risk and improve data governance
Continuously monitor and improve deployed models based on real-world feedback and performance metrics
Manage one or more Applications Development projects in an effort to accomplish established goals
Utilize in-depth knowledge and skills across multiple Applications Development areas to provide technical oversight across systems and applications
Review and analyze proposed technical solutions for projects
Contribute to formulation of strategies for applications development and other functional areas
Develop comprehensive knowledge of how areas of business integrate to accomplish business goals
Provide evaluative judgment based on analysis of factual data in complicated and unique situations
Impact the Applications Development area through monitoring delivery of end results, participate in budget management, and handling day-to-day staff management issues, including resource management and allocation of work within the team/project
Ensure essential procedures are followed and contribute to defining standards negotiating with external parties when necessary
Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency, as well as effectively supervise the activity of others and create accountability with those who fail to maintain these standards.

Recommended Qualifications:

6-10 years of relevant experience in the Financial Service industry
Experience as Applications Development Manager
Experience as senior level in an Applications Development role
Stakeholder and people management experience
Demonstrated leadership skills
Proven project management skills
Basic knowledge of industry practices and standards
Consistently demonstrates clear and concise written and verbal communication

Technical Skills:

Languages: Python, Java
ML Frameworks: Agent Development Kit, scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, VertexAi
Data & Processing: SQL, Spark, Databricks, Snowflake, or equivalent large-scale data platforms
Engineering: REST API development, Git, unit testing, code review

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience in financial services or a regulated industry
Familiarity with NLP, document processing, or entity extraction
Exposure to LLMs and generative AI for automation or data enrichment use cases
Knowledge of data quality frameworks, master data management (MDM), or data lineage tools
Experience building internal tools or platforms used by non-technical teams

Education:

Bachelor’s degree/University degree or equivalent experience
Master’s degree preferred

This job description provides a high-level review of the types of work performed. Other job-related duties may be assigned as required.
